childhood.familyBackground: Heiress to the Walmart fortune through her father Bud Walton, brother of Walmart founder Sam Walton. Bud Walton was an early business partner in Walmart's founding and expansion. Ann has a sister, Laurie (Nancy Walton Laurie).
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 아버지 Bud Walton을 통한 월마트 재산의 상속인이며, Bud Walton은 월마트 창립자 Sam Walton의 형제이자 초기 사업 파트너였다. Ann은 언니 Laurie (Nancy Walton Laurie)가 있다.
childhood.education: Missouri's Lincoln University, Registered Nurse credential
childhood.earlyLife: Born February 20, 1948, in Bentonville, Arkansas, Ann grew up in a wealthy retail family during Walmart's explosive growth in the 1950s-1960s. She attended local schools in Bentonville and pursued healthcare as a career path distinct from retail. After earning her nursing credentials from Lincoln University, she worked as a registered nurse in the late 1960s and early 1970s.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 1948년 2월 20일 아칸소주 벤턴빌에서 태어난 Ann은 1950년대-1960년대 월마트의 급속한 성장 시기에 부유한 소매 가정에서 성장했다. 벤턴빌의 지역 학교를 다녔고 소매와 다른 의료 분야의 경력을 추구했다. 링컨대학교에서 간호사 자격을 취득한 후 1960년대 후반과 1970년대 초반에 등록간호사로 근무했다.

careerTimeline.event: Completed nursing degree from Lincoln University in Missouri
Began career as a registered nurse in healthcare field
Married real estate developer Stanley Kroenke
Birth of daughter Whitney Ann Kroenke
Father Bud Walton passed away; Ann inherited significant Walmart stock holdings
careerTimeline.eventKo: 아버지 Bud Walton 서거; Ann은 상당한 월마트 주식을 상속받음

careerTimeline.event: Family became major shareholders in Denver Nuggets NBA team ownership
careerTimeline.eventKo: 가족이 Denver Nuggets NBA팀 소유권에서 주요 주주가 됨

careerTimeline.event: Became owner of Denver Nuggets (NBA) and Colorado Avalanche (NHL)
careerTimeline.eventKo: Denver Nuggets (NBA)와 Colorado Avalanche (NHL) 소유자가 됨

personalTraits.knownFor: Walmart heiress; owner of Denver Nuggets NBA team and Colorado Avalanche NHL team; healthcare professional background; family sports franchise ownership
personalTraits.knownForKo: 월마트 재산상속인; Denver Nuggets NBA팀 및 Colorado Avalanche NHL팀 소유자; 의료 전문가 배경; 가족 스포츠 프랜차이즈 소유권
